page: lessons/03-the-one-rule/index.html (driven as the student, in Chromium)

messages.content: You answer questions about the Bible. Never quote a verse from memory: always look it up with the lookup_verse tool, and quote only what it returns.
List exactly 5 Bible verses about forgiveness. Reply with exactly 5 lines and nothing else. Each line must look like this: Reference | the exact verse text, word for word, in the King James Version

function.name: lookup_verse
function.description: Look up the exact text of a Bible verse by reference, e.g. "John 3:16".

message.content:
1 Corinthians 7:10 | Let every man have his wife, and let every woman have her husband;
Ephesians 4:32 | And be kind one to another with tenderheartedness, forgiving one another even God in Christ.
Colossians 3:13 | Forbearing one another [and] forgiving one another; if any man have a quarrel against any,even as Christ forgave you, so also do ye.
Matthew 6:14-15 (NKJ) | For forgive your trespasses, and it may be well with you... And they will not forget the iniquity of them nor shall they remember their sins before God again.
Ephesians 4:32 (King James Version) | Be merciful one to another, even as Christ hath forgiven you.
